honesty_note: hook_duration here is detectOpeningHookStrength()'s 0-1 score, not a literal seconds value (see research/hour_12.md re: that detector's known saturation issue, not yet recalibrated). emotional_peaks is an audio-spike-timestamp proxy, not a trained emotion-detection signal. zoom_frequency/subtitle_style/caption_density for third-party clips are insufficient_data, never guessed.
